title: Wilted Bitter German Cheese Bake
description: A rich and savory German cheese dish featuring a blend of sharp cheeses and sweet raisins, served with a caramelized crust.
instructions: In a large skillet, combine olive oil and onion over medium heat. Cook until the onion is softened and translucent, about 8 minutes.
Add raisins and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until they start to plump.
In a separate saucepan, melt Emmentaler cheese over low heat, stirring constantly. Add Gruyere and Pecorino cheese and stir until well combined.
Pour the cheese mixture over the onion and raisin mixture, and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and smooth the top.
Drizzle balsamic vinegar over the top of the cheese mixture and sprinkle with a pinch of salt.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and immediately place the dish in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Let the dish cool to room temperature before serving.
